title: alysicarpus tetragonolobus
intro: Alysicarpus tetragonolobus, also known as four-angle pod, is a flowering plant in the genus Alysicarpus. It is a legume native to tropical Asia and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The plant has several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating skin conditions, and aiding in digestion. The herbal preparations of Alysicarpus tetragonolobus include decoctions, infusions, and powders, which can be used to treat various ailments.
